tests.message: Xi-7 CI stage order is deterministic across FAST/STRICT/FULL
Xi-7 FAST/STRICT/FULL profiles exist and fingerprints are stable
Xi-7 gate status propagates refused, stale, and blocking gate reports
Xi-7 gate definitions expose the required RepoX/AuditX/TestX/Omega surface
Xi-8 source-like roots are fully policy-classified and no prohibited top-level dirs remain
Xi-8 repository structure lock is complete and hash-stable

archive_determinism_scan.description: Search governed distribution/update tooling for archive generation paths that would embed timestamps or non-deterministic ordering metadata.

dist_bundle_composition_scan.description: Ensure distribution assembly derives bundle contents from the component graph and install profiles, not hardcoded component sets.

target_matrix_scan.description: Ensure release indices honor target tiers and platform claims match the declared target matrix.

trust_bypass_scan.description: Ensure hashes are mandatory, signatures are enforced per policy, and no trust-verification bypass exists.

update_model_scan.description: Ensure update resolution is release-index-driven, component-graph-resolved, and free of direct download shortcuts.

steps.expected_result: deterministic CLI bootstrap opens the baseline universe context
steps.title: Launch

steps.expected_result: teleport planning remains deterministic for sol, earth, and the baseline surface coordinate
steps.title: Teleport

steps.expected_result: scanner surfaces elevation and climate proxies for the baseline tile without GUI-only state
steps.title: Inspect

steps.expected_result: one baseline surface tile selection is mined deterministically through process.geometry_remove
steps.title: Modify Terrain

steps.expected_result: L1 and compiled L2 logic outputs remain deterministic for the canonical smoke network
steps.title: Logic Interaction

steps.expected_result: the gameplay loop emits the same save hash as the frozen baseline universe save
steps.title: Save

steps.expected_result: reloading the saved universe reproduces the same post-edit proof anchor
steps.title: Reload

steps.expected_result: replaying from the baseline seed reproduces the same final anchor as reload
steps.title: Replay

suite_results.description: Validate governed JSON schemas and CompatX version policy.
Validate governed registries and META-STABILITY markers.
Validate additive universal identity blocks and canonical identity serialization.
Validate semantic contract registry and default contract bundle pins.
Validate PACK-COMPAT compatibility reports and pack lock generation inputs.
Validate CAP-NEG endpoint interoperability and record verification.
Validate LIB install, instance, save, and artifact surfaces.
Validate TIME-ANCHOR tick width, anchor emission, and compaction boundary rules.
Validate constitutional architectural purity and audit surfaces.
